# Changelog

## HVD 2.0 restructure

- Restructured the original HCP Vault Radar guidance into the HVD 2.0 guide model. Consumer content — deployment models, using Vault Radar in pipelines, and remediation workflows — now forms this User Guide. Operator content moved to the [Administration Guide](/validated-designs/vault-radar/administration-guide/introduction).
- The former standalone "Conclusion" section was folded into the [Introduction](/validated-designs/vault-radar/user-guide/introduction).
